svg.metadata: {"_description":"A blogging-platform ER diagram: users, posts, comments, tags.","type":"datadict","title":"blog ER","entities":[{"id":"users","label":"users","fields":[{"name":"id","type":"uuid","pk":true},{"name":"email","type":"varchar"},{"name":"name","type":"varchar"},{"name":"created_at","type":"timestamp"}]},{"id":"posts","label":"posts","accent":"accent","fields":[{"name":"id","type":"uuid","pk":true},{"name":"author_id","type":"uuid","fk":true},{"name":"title","type":"varchar"},{"name":"body","type":"text"},{"name":"published_at","type":"timestamp","nullable":true}]},{"id":"comments","label":"comments","fields":[{"name":"id","type":"uuid","pk":true},{"name":"post_id","type":"uuid","fk":true},{"name":"author_id","type":"uuid","fk":true},{"name":"body","type":"text"},{"name":"created_at","type":"timestamp"}]},{"id":"tags","label":"tags","fields":[{"name":"id","type":"uuid","pk":true},{"name":"name","type":"varchar"}]},{"id":"post_tags","label":"post_tags","fields":[{"name":"post_id","type":"uuid","pk":true,"fk":true},{"name":"tag_id","type":"uuid","pk":true,"fk":true}]}],"relations":[{"from":"posts.author_id","to":"users.id","label":"wrote","kind":"one-to-many"},{"from":"comments.post_id","to":"posts.id","label":"on","kind":"one-to-many"},{"from":"comments.author_id","to":"users.id","label":"by","kind":"one-to-many"},{"from":"post_tags.post_id","to":"posts.id","label":"tags","kind":"many-to-many"},{"from":"post_tags.tag_id","to":"tags.id","label":"tagged-by","kind":"many-to-many"}]}
